content.text:
`★ Insight ─────────────────────────────────────`
- Replaced emoji icons (`🤖`/`👤`) with lucide-react `Bookmark` and `User` SVG components — these render consistently across platforms (emojis can look different on macOS vs Windows vs Linux) and are easier to style with Tailwind classes like `text-accent-fg`.
- The `Bookmark` icon visually conveys "saved point in time" which fits the checkpoint concept well.
`─────────────────────────────────────────────────`

Done — replaced the robot emoji with a `Bookmark` icon and the person emoji with a `User` icon, both from lucide-react. Agent checkpoints show a bookmark in accent color, manual commits show a user icon in muted color.
